{"credits": [{"type": "finder", "user": {"avatar_url": "https://avatars.githubusercontent.com/u/1709030?v=4", "events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/moolen/events{/privacy}", "followers_url": "https://api.github.com/users/moolen/followers", "following_url": "https://api.github.com/users/moolen/following{/other_user}", "gists_url": "https://api.github.com/users/moolen/gists{/gist_id}", "gravatar_id": "", "html_url": "https://github.com/moolen", "id": 1709030, "login": "moolen", "node_id": "MDQ6VXNlcjE3MDkwMzA=", "organizations_url": "https://api.github.com/users/moolen/orgs", "received_events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/moolen/received_events", "repos_url": "https://api.github.com/users/moolen/repos", "site_admin": false, "starred_url": "https://api.github.com/users/moolen/starred{/owner}{/repo}", "subscriptions_url": "https://api.github.com/users/moolen/subscriptions", "type": "User", "url": "https://api.github.com/users/moolen", "user_view_type": "public"}}], "cve_id": "CVE-2026-42875", "cvss": {"score": null, "vector_string": null}, "cvss_severities": {"cvss_v3": {"score": 0.0, "vector_string": null}, "cvss_v4": {"score": 5.3, "vector_string": "CVSS:4.0/AV:N/AC:L/AT:N/PR:L/UI:N/VC:N/VI:N/VA:N/SC:L/SI:L/SA:N"}}, "cwes": [{"cwe_id": "CWE-285", "name": "Improper Authorization"}, {"cwe_id": "CWE-668", "name": "Exposure of Resource to Wrong Sphere"}], "description": "### Impact

Namespaced SecretStore resources that used CAProvider with type `ConfigMap` could resolve CA material from another namespace when `caProvider.namespace` was set. 
This bypassed the namespace boundary enforced for SecretStore-backed references in providers that rely on the shared runtime CA resolver. 

The accessible data is used as CA validation material, hence it is not directly exposed.

Impact:
- Direct data exfiltration risk: low
- Existence disclosure: an attacker can infer whether a target ConfigMap/key exists in another namespace.
- Trust-boundary violation: a tenant can make its SecretStore consume CA material owned by another namespace.", "epss": {"percentage": 0.0024, "percentile": 0.1487}, "ghsa_id": "GHSA-wv26-88m5-6h59", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-05-05T18:37:12Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-wv26-88m5-6h59", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-wv26-88m5-6h59"}, {"type": "CVE", "value": "CVE-2026-42875"}], "nvd_published_at": "2026-05-11T20:25:44Z", "published_at": "2026-05-05T18:37:12Z", "references": ["https://github.com/external-secrets/external-secrets/security/advisories/GHSA-wv26-88m5-6h59", "https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-42875", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-wv26-88m5-6h59"], "repository_advisory_url": "https://api.github.com/repos/external-secrets/external-secrets/security-advisories/GHSA-wv26-88m5-6h59", "severity": "medium", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/external-secrets/external-secrets", "summary": "External Secrets Operator has Namespace Isolation Bypass in CAProvider ConfigMap Resolution for SecretStore", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-05-13T14:18:54Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-wv26-88m5-6h59", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": "2.4.0", "package": {"ecosystem": "go", "name": "github.com/external-secrets/external-secrets"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": "< 2.4.0"}], "withdrawn_at": null}

reasons: 資産不一致または判定情報不足

title: External Secrets Operator has Namespace Isolation Bypass in CAProvider ConfigMap Resolution for SecretStore
